steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Given $7 + x = 4$, rewrite the target expression: $42 + 6x = 6(7 + x)$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $24$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $24$ is the value to enter.
